intake.user_request: Address the remaining gaps from the post-improvement self-scan: capability/layer still 0 in index.json (parse gap in populate pipeline), stale count 797 (target < 100, exports_match_ast still fires on complex pipeline files).

classification.plan_type_rationale: Two distinct root-cause investigations + fixes. Each fix requires its own research, implementation, and validation phase. Phased keeps them independently gated.

in_scope: Fix populate pipeline to extract @capability/@layer from semantic header blocks into element.capability and element.layer fields in index.json
Investigate and reduce exports_match_ast stale count from 797 toward < 100 — audit why @exports headers don't match tree-sitter AST output on complex pipeline files
Validate both fixes by running populate.js and checking metrics
out_of_scope: capability/layer in RAG vector metadata (separate WO: WO-PROPAGATE-LAYER-INTO-RAG-VECTOR-METADATA-001)
New test authoring for unrelated elements
Scanner changes beyond what's needed for stale fix

constraints: Must validate with populate.js run after each fix
No breaking changes to existing index.json schema
